items.name: Solarise Energy Fund Platform (AE Solar Korea)
items.description: Comprehensive solar investment ecosystem — public website, member portal, admin panel, and mobile application. Features investment simulation, automated dividend distribution, biometric authentication, real-time exchange rates, multi-language support, and role-based permissions.

items.name: Hinode Ball Potto
items.description: Japanese glass manufacturer product showcase and CMS. Features product & distributor management, admin dashboard, SSR rendering, responsive design, and image upload system.

items.name: MetaCare
items.description: Health & wellness e-commerce platform built at Xurpas Inc. Backend development, API integrations, merchant onboarding, appointments, and notifications.

items.name: MemaChat
items.description: Real-time messaging platform built at Xurpas Inc. Full-stack development including user management, rewards management, and real-time messaging.

items.name: Playfriends
items.description: Creator booking and scheduling platform built at Xurpas Inc. Full-stack development including scheduling system, payment integrations, and chat functionality.

items.name: Food Truck
items.description: Vendor-based ordering and delivery platform. Vendor management, delivery scheduling, real-time chat, and customer ordering.

items.name: Online School Management
items.description: Thesis Project - Online School Management web application.

items.name: Pharmacy Stock Inventory
items.description: Simple inventory system for a pharmacy store.
